source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 廉价低质“迪卡侬”流向全国
topics.official_english: Low-quality counterfeit Decathlon products flood Chinese market
topics.why_hot: Consumer safety and brand protection concerns resonate widely.
topics.share_angle: How to spot fake outdoor gear and what it means for consumer rights.

topics.chinese_topic: 人民日报：儿童手表能不能做减法

topics.share_angle: The pros and cons of smartwatches for children and what regulators say.

topics.official_english: Technology makes cultural relics visible and tangible
topics.why_hot: Museums use AR/VR to enhance visitor experience, sparking cultural interest.
topics.share_angle: How digital innovation is preserving and presenting China's heritage.

topics.official_english: New York Knicks win NBA championship

topics.share_angle: The Knicks' historic run and what it means for basketball fans worldwide.

topics.chinese_topic: 考编第一被人递补维权后岗位取消
